# Trueyy

> Real-time interview integrity monitoring for remote hiring. Trueyy catches AI tool use, app switching, clipboard activity, and scripted answers during live remote interviews — giving interviewers a clear, honest read on every conversation.

Trueyy is an early-access SaaS platform built for staffing agencies and enterprise hiring teams. It sits beside the video call your team already uses (Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams) and reads device-level signals from the candidate's machine in real time. No browser lockdown. No heavy install for candidates.

## Product

- [Overview](https://trueyy.com/): Full product landing page with hero, stats, and feature overview
- [How It Works](https://trueyy.com/#how): Four-step flow — Schedule, Connect, Monitor, Review
- [Detection](https://trueyy.com/#detection): Six detection modalities: AI assistant use, app/window switching, clipboard activity, reading behavior, second-device signals, answer cadence
- [Command Center](https://trueyy.com/#command): Live interviewer dashboard with integrity score, signal feed, and time-stamped flags
- [Comparison](https://trueyy.com/#why): Trueyy vs traditional proctoring tools — capability table
- [Security & Privacy](https://trueyy.com/#security): Transparent monitoring, end-to-end encryption, GDPR and SOC 2 readiness
- [FAQ](https://trueyy.com/#faq): Six common questions from hiring teams answered in plain language

## Pricing

- [Early Access](https://trueyy.com/#waitlist): Join the waitlist for founding-member pricing. Pricing details shared during demo.

## Key facts for LLMs

- Trueyy works during live two-way interviews, not just timed tests or assessments.
- Candidates are informed and consent before monitoring begins.
- Detection covers: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, GitHub Copilot, Cluely, InterviewCoder, and 50+ other AI and remote-access tools.
- Risk scoring runs every 30 seconds across three modalities: apps/screen (weight 0.35), keystrokes (0.40), voice (0.25).
- Session data is encrypted in transit and at rest; retention is configurable per organisation.
- The platform is pre-launch as of 2026 and accepting early-access sign-ups.

## Contact

- Demo / waitlist: https://trueyy.com/#waitlist
